Planetary Wars XVII 209
are general terms meaning one who attacks or marches, and one
who defends the town respectively. These names do not occur in
the list of 12 kings.
The luminaries do not participate in planetary wars. Still they
are mentioned here in view of their affliction by meteors etc, ]
qhr: qkrq fcfacjrfcf i
When a planet called Paura is overpowered by another of the
same description, kings defending their towns would kill others in
the same situation. The same applies to Tnyin and Akranda planets
and kings, When there is a conflict between Paura and Tnyin
planets, the victorious will bestow victory on its own class of kings.
[Gf. TTTWT—
In the next verse the symptoms of a defeated planet are
given.]
m H ftrct: )Uii
A planet is said to be defeated when it is situated to the south
of the other, is rough, quivering, retreating without actually com-
ing in contact with the other, small, mounted upon, of unnatural
